description: Also known as the Wailing Capital Wald Uberlisterin‚ or the Capital of Grief‚ Eld Sleika‚ depicts a castle amidst the Forest of Everlasting Darkness․ It is the underworld sealed beneath the Dead World of Indieglut Lugh․ Faithfully recreated from the game ․hack⁄⁄GU Last Recode
